title: Enable team sign-up with three open slots

requirements.summary: Replace the locked 'Registration Closed' state with a functional sign-up form that accepts submissions
acceptanceCriteria: The Sign-Up page renders a form (name, position, experience level at minimum) instead of the 'No Positions Left' locked state.
The form can be submitted by any visitor (anonymous or authenticated).
Successful submission shows a confirmation message.

file_operations.description: Replace the static 'No Positions Left' locked state with a functional sign-up form. The form must collect name, email, phone, age, position (select dropdown using Position enum), and experience level (select dropdown using ExperienceLevel enum). Wire the form submission to the submitSignUp backend capability via the useSubmitSignUp hook from useQueries.ts. Display a success confirmation message after submission and handle errors gracefully. Keep the HeroSection component intact per the constraints. Use shadcn/ui form components (Button, Input, Select) for consistent styling with the navy/gold theme.

Add a useGetRemainingSlots hook that fetches all sign-ups via getAllSignUps and calculates remaining slots as (3 - total count). Return the remaining count and loading state. This hook will be used to display slot availability on the sign-up form and determine when to lock the form.

requirements.summary: Enforce a 3-slot team capacity limit with real-time slot tracking and automatic form lock when full
acceptanceCriteria: Only 3 sign-up submissions are accepted in total before the form is locked.
The backend returns an error when a 4th submission is attempted.
The frontend displays remaining slot count (e.g., '2 slots remaining') and updates it after each submission.
When all 3 slots are filled, the form is replaced with a 'Team Full' notice.

file_operations.description: Use the useGetRemainingSlots hook to fetch and display remaining slot count above the form (e.g., '2 slots remaining'). Conditionally render the form only when slots remain (remainingSlots > 0). When remainingSlots equals 0, replace the form with a 'Team Full' or 'No Slots Remaining' message styled consistently with the existing locked state UI. After successful form submission, invalidate the sign-ups query to refresh the slot count immediately. Handle backend errors (e.g., capacity exceeded) and display them to the user.
